purpose: Define how backend maintenance settings control the frontend provider selection list and runtime request behavior.
design_goals: Backend maintenance owns the provider configuration.
Frontend users only choose from enabled providers.
Runtime requests always use the backend-maintained provider config.
API keys are stored in provider config, not entered on the main page.

provider_fields.name: enabled
provider_fields.purpose: Controls whether the provider appears in frontend selection.

provider_fields.name: baseUrl
provider_fields.purpose: Provider endpoint used for runtime requests.

provider_fields.name: model
provider_fields.purpose: Default model name sent in requests.

frontend_binding_rules.selection_list_rule: Only providers with enabled=true are rendered in the frontend provider select.
frontend_binding_rules.selected_provider_rule: If the current provider is disabled, fallback to defaultProvider. If defaultProvider is also invalid, fallback to the first enabled provider.
frontend_binding_rules.runtime_request_rule: When a user runs AI generation, the request must use baseUrl, model, and apiKey from the currently selected provider config.
frontend_binding_rules.frontend_visibility_rule: The main page does not expose API key editing. API settings are only editable in backend maintenance.
frontend_binding_rules.error_rule: If apiKey is empty for the selected provider, frontend must block the request and show a clear maintenance-related error.

backend_maintenance: Maintainer edits provider enabled flag, baseUrl, model, and apiKey.
Frontend selection list is rebuilt from enabled providers.
frontend_usage: System sends request using that provider's backend-maintained config.

normalization_rules: If a provider config is missing fields, merge it with defaults before rendering or sending requests.
Keep provider key names stable across tools, for example: deepseek, openai, gemini.
Display label can change per tool, but provider key should remain stable for reuse.

reference_runtime_functions.name: renderProviderSelectOptions
reference_runtime_functions.purpose: Render frontend selection list from enabled providers.

reference_runtime_functions.name: getApiFormConfig
reference_runtime_functions.purpose: Read backend maintenance form values into a normalized config object.

reference_runtime_functions.name: buildProviderRequestWithConfig
reference_runtime_functions.purpose: Build provider-specific request payload from the normalized config.
